shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "test -d node_modules/next/dist/docs && find node_modules/next/dist/docs -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#"'^#DOC #'"'; true"
/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "revalidateTag|updateTag|cacheTag|cacheLife|Server Action|inline Server Action|use cache" node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app node_modules/next/dist/docs/index.mdx'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' app/page.tsx && printf '\\n---FILE---\\n' && sed -n '1,240p' lib/db.js && printf '\\n---FILE---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' package.json && printf '\\n---FILE---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' next.config.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba lib/db.js | sed -n '1,240p' && printf '\\n---FILE---\\n' && nl -ba next.config.ts | sed -n '1,80p' && printf '\\n---FILE---\\n' && nl -ba tsconfig.json | sed -n '1,120p'"
